exemplar.title: How do static and dynamic quantization techniques compare in optimizing the computational efficiency of deep learning models for computer vision applications while preserving accuracy?

detailedExemplarData.title: How do static and dynamic quantization techniques compare in optimizing the computational efficiency of deep learning models for computer vision applications while preserving accuracy?

strengths: Clear, precise framing of the topic with consistently focused sections linked back to the research question.
Research question is sharply stated, technically precise, and tightly aligned with methodology and discussion.
weaknesses: Minor lapses in citation style and occasional heading repetition prevent the award of full marks.
Methodological range is good but limited by the omission of statistical significance testing and use of only a single dataset/model.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student communicates the topic and research question with precision and maintains a clear, consistent focus throughoutâhallmarks of the top band. However, minor stylistic lapses and a slightly narrowed methodological scope (no statistical significance tests, single dataset/model) preclude the full 6 points. A score of 5 accurately reflects their secure position in the 5â6 band without overreaching.

strengths: Demonstrates solid grasp of deep-learning concepts, drawing on a broad and mostly recent literature base.
Technical terminology (e.g., FP32, INT8, FLOPs) is used competently and appropriately throughout.
weaknesses: A few imprecise phrases and minor terminology slips (e.g., âDependantâ variables) limit consistency.
Some key sources are referenced but not deeply integrated, and certain claims lack critical nuance or quantitative backing.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work exhibits good subject knowledge and generally accurate use of discipline-specific terminology, placing it squarely in the 3â4 band. Occasional imprecision and superficial source integration prevent elevation to the 5â6 band, justifying a score of 4.

strengths: Research is consistently relevant, with empirical results contextualized by literature and hardware constraints.
Data analysis is coherent, with appropriate calculations (latency averages, quantization error, FLOPs) and mostly logical interpretation of results.
Discussion balances accuracy-efficiency trade-offs, acknowledges limitations, and proposes sensible future work.
weaknesses: Absence of statistical significance testing and limited error analysis reduce analytical rigor.
Some evaluative claims (e.g., â~1â2% accuracy loss is minorâ) lack quantified support, and alternative explanations are not fully explored.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs critical thinking demonstrates clear, well-supported conclusions and effective linkage to the research questionâqualities at the upper end of the 7â9 band and edging into strong performance. While they fall short of the 10â12 band due to missing statistical tests and deeper evaluation, their sustained integration of research, analysis, and critical discussion justifies an 8 out of 12.

strengths: Professional use of LaTeX, consistent fonts, clear tables, and color-coded graphs aid comprehension.
Comprehensive table of contents and numbered sections/subsections enhance navigation.
weaknesses: Uneven image resolution and figures split across pages detract from polish.
Duplicate/mis-numbered headings and abrupt paragraph breaks interrupt flow, indicating imperfect organisation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The presentation is generally effectiveâsupporting understanding through structure and layoutâplacing it convincingly in the 3â4 band. Persistent but not debilitating issues prevent the award of the maximum 4 points, making 3 an appropriate reflection of quality.

strandSelections.reasoning: The methodology is generally comprehensive: variables are formally defined, mathematical formulations are supplied, and the workflow diagram clarifies procedures. Tool and dataset choices are justified and replication appears feasible. However, the essay omits statistical significance tests and employs only a single model and dataset, limiting the range of methods. Links between specific methodological choices (e.g., calibration batch size, epoch selection) and the research question are present but not always fully articulated, keeping the strand in the 3-4 band at the upper level.

Quantitative data are processed into clear tables and graphs, and the student draws mostly logical conclusions (e.g., linking Intelâs INT8 support to latency gains). Calculations such as quantization error, latency averages and FLOPs are appropriate and interpreted coherently. However, the absence of statistical significance testing and limited error analysis reduce the rigour of the analytical depth, keeping the performance withinâbut not at the top ofâthe 4-6 band (score 6 signals solid but not exemplary analysis).

The essay follows a logical EE structure with numbered sections, subsections, and a detailed table of contents. Figure and table lists, appendices, and reference section enhance navigation. Nevertheless, duplicate or mis-numbered headings and occasional abrupt paragraph breaks interrupt flow, and repetition of section headers (e.g., dual Figure captions) suggests imperfect organisation. These issues align with the 3-4 band; a score of 3 reflects generally effective but not flawless structure.

The discussion weighs accuracy losses against efficiency gains and relates outcomes to practical deployment scenarios, acknowledging hardware impacts and experimental limitations. The evaluation notes calibration sensitivity and advocates future work on broader datasets and models, showing reflective thinking. Yet, some evaluative claims lack quantified backing (e.g., â~1â2 % accuracy loss is minorâ), and the analysis does not fully explore alternative explanations or statistical confidence, placing it mid-band (5).

Technical terminologyâFP32, INT8, tail latency, FLOPs, calibrationâappears frequently and is largely used correctly, signalling competent command of CS vocabulary. Occasional slips (e.g., âDependantâ variables, âComputation Comparisionâ) and a few imprecise phrases prevent complete consistency. Overall usage exceeds adequacy but falls short of the sustained precision expected for the 5-6 band, justifying a high 3-4 band score of 4.

The selection and application of research and data are clearly relevant to the question. Empirical results are systematically gathered across two hardware platforms, and literature is woven into the narrative to contextualise findings. The student consistently links external sources and theoretical models to experimental choices, demonstrating good (though not flawless) integration. Some reliance on secondary summaries and limited triangulation temper the depth, anchoring the work in the lower end of the 7-9 band.

Fonts, spacing and LaTeX-rendered equations create a professional appearance; colour-coded graphs and tables aid comprehension. Mandatory elements (title, word count, page numbers) are present. However, uneven image resolution, some figures split across pages, and inconsistent alt-text/citation formatting detract from overall polish. Such partial weaknesses fit the âlayout considerations are generally applied but with some weaknessesâ descriptor, earning a solid 3 in the upper presentation band.

The student demonstrates solid understanding of deep-learning conceptsâCNNs, ResNet architecture, quantization mathematicsâand draws upon a broad, mostly recent literature base. Explanations of INT8 arithmetic, calibration, and hardware constraints show insight. Nonetheless, some claims (e.g., INT8 â16Ã fasterâ on GPUs) are stated without critical nuance, and a few key sources (e.g., seminal quantization papers) are referenced but not deeply integrated. The knowledge is therefore good rather than excellent, meriting a secure 4 in the 3-4 band.

The research question is prominently stated, sharply focused and expressed in precise, technical language. Subsequent sections (methodology, analysis, conclusion) reference the RQ explicitly, demonstrating a tight alignment between the investigation and the guiding question. A slight redundancy in restating the RQ under multiple headings limits elegance but not effectiveness, placing the work firmly in the top band though not compelling a 6.

The topic is immediately conveyed through a precise, disciplinary title and an opening paragraph that frames the practical need to deploy computer-vision models on constrained hardware. Throughout the essay the student maintains a clear, consistent focus on comparing static and dynamic quantization, and every major section (background, methodology, results, discussion) is explicitly linked back to that core purpose. Minor issuesâsuch as occasional heading repetitionâdo not seriously impede topic communication, so performance is securely within the 5-6 band, though some lapses in citation style prevent full marks.

annotations.comment: The detailed table of contents with numbered sections and subsections enhances navigation and clearly outlines the structure of the report.
The inclusion of verbose code snippets in the main body interrupts narrative flow; consider summarizing in the text and moving full scripts to the appendix.
The latency comparison in Graph 3 is interpreted clearly with insightful commentary on hardware optimizations, demonstrating good integration of empirical data with theory.
The personal narrative of competing in the Microsoft Imagine Cup demonstrates genuine intellectual and personal engagement, setting a compelling context for the investigation.

The methodology summary describes applying quantization to ResNet-18 on TinyImageNet but omits justification for selecting TinyImageNet; a brief rationale of dataset suitability would strengthen methodological focus.

The research question is stated with precision, clearly focused on comparing static and dynamic quantization for efficiency versus accuracy, and is well connected to the subsequent methodology and analysis.
The title is concise, technical and immediately communicates the focus on quantization techniques for deep learning efficiency, providing a clear disciplinary context for the investigation.
Figure 1 is well supported by an alt description and caption, aiding accessibility and clarity of the CNN architecture diagram.
The theoretical model clearly defines independent variables and quantization operators using precise mathematical notation, demonstrating a rigorous methodology foundation.
Graph 5âs runtime memory bars use a scale up to 4000 MB, but the dynamic and static values differ substantially; splitting the chart or adding gridlines would clarify these differences.
The discussion notes that FLOPS remain similar post-quantization, correctly reflecting that quantization does not alter operation count, showing alignment between theory and observed data.
The word count is provided and falls within the 4 000-word limit, demonstrating compliance with formatting requirements.
The claim that CNNs âfar outperform traditional neural networksâ would benefit from a specific metric or example to substantiate the comparison quantitatively.

The literature overview of computer vision algorithms is descriptive; critical discussion of how pruning versus quantization specifically addresses efficiency gaps would deepen subject knowledge application.
The use of terminology such as âfeature learningâ and citation of Goodfellow et al. (2016) shows a solid understanding of deep learning concepts and their hierarchical nature.
The statement that INT8 is âup to 16Ã fasterâ on GPUs is presented without nuance; a critical note on hardware dependency or variation across architectures would improve analytical depth.
The quantization error definition $$\Delta(x)=\|f(x;\theta)-f_q(x;\theta^{(int8)})\|_2$$ is an appropriate formal measure that enables objective comparison of model outputs.
Including tail-latency (99th percentile) as a dependent variable shows sophisticated consideration of worst-case performance, essential for real-time applications.
The static quantization formula is correctly stated but lacks discussion of how rounding error impacts layer outputs and overall model performance.
The experimental flowchart in Figure 3 provides a clear, step-by-step visual of the methodology, enhancing comprehension of the procedural workflow.
The sample images from TinyImageNet are informative, but low resolution and small size reduce impact; higher quality images or direct pagination would improve clarity.
The legend graphic for accuracy, computation and model metrics uses distinct colors which effectively differentiate data categories in Figure 9.
The tabular results lack any indication of variability or statistical significance; including confidence intervals or p-values would strengthen analytical rigour.
Graph 2âs y-axis scale is broad relative to the small range of quantization error values; zooming into the 0â0.06 range more tightly would improve visual discrimination.
The evaluation acknowledges a ~1â2% accuracy drop as modest without supporting statistical analysis; incorporating significance testing would substantiate this claim.
The comparison between Intel and AMD highlights the interplay of hardware-specific quantization optimizations, demonstrating awareness of research application beyond pure algorithmic factors.
Several reference entries are incomplete or inconsistently formatted, e.g., missing URLs or publication details; standardizing reference style would improve formatting compliance.

rubricData.rubricSpecificInfo: The Computer Science Extended Essay is a 4,000-word independent research project that allows students to explore a specific topic within computer science. This essay emphasizes technical analysis and original thought, encouraging students to delve into areas such as algorithm efficiency, software development, or the impact of computing technologies. By engaging in the EE, students apply their theoretical knowledge to practical scenarios, enhancing their problem-solving and analytical skills, while contributing original insights to the field of computer science.
rubricData.name: Computer Science EE
